summary: Tested new features for FinRomania 2.0: CFD vs Acțiuni Reale page, Email Rezumat Zilnic toggle in notifications, Export CSV for Screener PRO and Portofoliu BVB. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend: 13/14 feature checks passed. One backend performance issue found: Screener PRO scan returns 502 gateway timeout.

minor.issue: Returns 502 Bad Gateway (Kubernetes ingress timeout) - scan takes >60s to complete. Export CSV button is properly coded in frontend but users never see it because the scan never completes successfully. Pre-existing issue, not new.

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/auth/demo-login?secret=finromania-demo-2026 returns session_token
✅ GET /api/daily-summary/my-subscription returns 401 without auth
✅ POST /api/daily-summary/toggle-subscription returns 401 without auth
✅ GET /api/daily-summary/my-subscription returns {subscribed: bool, email: str} with valid token
✅ POST /api/daily-summary/toggle-subscription correctly toggles subscribed state
✅ POST /api/daily-summary/toggle-subscription returns {success, subscribed, message}
✅ Toggle state is persisted - GET after POST reflects new state
✅ GET /api/daily-summary/preview returns 200 or 404 (no summary yet)
✅ GET /api/daily-summary/subscribers/count returns {total, registered_users, anonymous}
✅ /educatie-cfd-vs-actiuni page loads with title 'CFD-uri vs. Acțiuni Reale'
✅ CFD page: Red alert badge 'Avertisment important pentru investitori' visible
✅ CFD page: Warning banner with '74-89%' text visible
✅ CFD page: Comparison table with 10 rows visible
✅ CFD page: FAQ section with 6 items, toggle expand/collapse works
✅ CFD page: Links to /stocks, /calculator-dividende, /screener-pro all present
✅ Footer: Link to /educatie-cfd-vs-actiuni 'CFD vs Acțiuni Reale' present
✅ Mobile menu ACADEMIA section: 'CFD vs Acțiuni Reale' link present with correct href
✅ /notifications page loads with 'Email Zilnic — Rezumatul Bursei' section
✅ Email toggle (data-testid=daily-summary-email-toggle) visible for logged-in user
✅ Email toggle click triggers POST /api/daily-summary/toggle-subscription, shows 'Salvat!' badge
✅ After toggle ON: status text shows 'Activ — emailul vine zilnic la demo@finromania.ro'
✅ Green confirmation banner appears when subscribed
✅ Portfolio BVB: Export CSV button (data-testid=export-portfolio-csv) appears in 'Poziții Active' header when positions exist
✅ Portfolio BVB: POST /api/portfolio-bvb/position API works correctly (200 OK)
✅ Screener PRO: exportCSV function correctly coded (creates CSV blob, triggers download)
failed_tests: ⚠️ Screener PRO: Export CSV button not visible to users because GET /api/screener-pro/scan returns 502 (ingress gateway timeout - scan takes >60s). Button is implemented but inaccessible.
action_items: MEDIUM: Fix Screener PRO scan timeout - /api/screener-pro/scan takes >60s causing 502 from Kubernetes ingress. Options: (1) Add result caching - scan runs in background and caches results, (2) Increase timeout for this specific route, (3) Use WebSocket/SSE for progressive results. The Export CSV button is correctly implemented but users can never see it due to this timeout.
LOW: data-testid attributes missing on ScreenerProPage export button (line 404) - add data-testid='export-screener-csv' for automated testing
critical_code_review_comments: Screener PRO scan (GET /api/screener-pro/scan) fetches RSI, MACD, SMA, EMA, BBands, fundamentals for each of ~50+ BVB stocks sequentially/in parallel from EODHD - this causes 60+ second response times. Kubernetes ingress times out at 60s. Users never see completed results (502 error). Fix: implement background job + cache, or chunked/streaming response.

PortfolioBVBPage.jsx Export CSV button missing data-testid attribute (around line 326) - currently uses data-testid='export-portfolio-csv' (verified working). Screener export button at line 404 has no data-testid.
Notification toggle (Switch component in NotificationSettingsPage) correctly calls POST toggle-subscription and updates UI state with 'Salvat!' feedback and green confirmation banner.

success_rate.frontend: 93% (13/14 feature checks - screener scan timeout is pre-existing)

test_credentials: Demo PRO: GET /api/auth/demo-login?secret=finromania-demo-2026 → session_token. Keys: finromania_token, finromania_user in localStorage.
seed_data_creation: Added and then deleted TLV position in demo user portfolio for testing. Cleanup done.
context_for_next_testing_agent: FinRomania 2.0 new features all tested. CFD page at /educatie-cfd-vs-actiuni is fully functional with all sections (title, badge, warning, comparison table 10 rows, FAQ 6 items, alternatives, footer link). Email toggle in /notifications works (POST /api/daily-summary/toggle-subscription + GET /my-subscription verified). Portfolio BVB /portfolio-bvb Export CSV button (data-testid=export-portfolio-csv) appears in 'Poziții Active' header when positions.length > 0. Screener PRO /screener-pro Export CSV button is coded but needs scan to complete first - scan times out (502). Mobile menu ACADEMIA section has CFD vs Acțiuni Reale link. Auth: use finromania_token/finromania_user localStorage keys.
